title: CellixJS Shared Cellix Package Catalog
citation: CellixJS packages/cellix folder, root package metadata, and repository license, accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Assess shared Cellix-compatible packages that may be copied as immutable external library code under packages/cellix or adapted under packages/openclinxr.
claims_supported: The CellixJS root package declares an MIT license.

The CellixJS repository includes packages/cellix/api-services-spec, archunit-tests, config-rolldown, config-typescript, config-vitest, domain-seedwork, event-bus-seedwork-node, graphql-codegen, graphql-core, mongoose-seedwork, server-mongodb-memory-mock-seedwork, server-oauth2-mock-seedwork, and ui-core.
The CellixJS config-rolldown package peers rolldown 1.0.0-beta.55 and provides an Azure Functions Rolldown config factory plus deploy artifact preparation helper.
The CellixJS config-typescript package exports base, node, and vitest tsconfig files.
The CellixJS config-vitest package exports base, node, and Storybook-oriented Vitest configs.
The CellixJS mongoose-seedwork package declares peer dependencies on mongoose ^8.0.0 and mongodb ^6.0.0.
The CellixJS ui-core package declares peer dependencies compatible with Ant Design 6, React, React DOM, react-oidc-context, and React Router DOM.
claims_not_supported: That OpenClinXR should vendor any CellixJS package before a concrete implementation slice needs it.
That OpenClinXR-specific product behavior belongs inside packages/cellix rather than packages/openclinxr.
